title: Infosys Receives UAE VAT Penalty Order
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that it received communication from the Federal Tax Authority, United Arab Emirates, for collection of a penalty totaling AED 45,476.73. The penalty relates to failure to pay VAT liability for Q1FY26. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication from the Federal Tax Authority, United Arab Emirates, for collection of a penalty.
The total penalty is AED 45,476.73/- and relates to failure to pay VAT liability for Q1FY26.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.authority_or_counterparty: Federal Tax Authority, United Arab Emirates
litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty on account of failure to pay VAT liability for Q1FY26.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated absence of material impact.

search_keywords: Federal Tax Authority United Arab Emirates
